description: Blueprint of transactional business workflows, automation rules, and lifecycle transitions

workflows.name: Daily Profit Distribution Payout
triggers: Daily automated cron trigger at midnight
stateTransitions: pending -> active (if deposit lock period ends)
active -> completed (if repeat count limit or max profit limit reached)

workflows.name: MLM Rank Qualification Calculation
stateTransitions: Member -> Executive (if PV >= 100, Left Volume >= 500, Right Volume >= 500)
edgeCases: Required sponsor active directs not met
